description: Digital platform supporting Aboriginal communities with health information, research data collection, and cross-community communication.
responsibilities: Build React admin portal and React Native mobile app, integrate existing Firebase backend, establish deployment processes and team development standards.
highlights: Architected cross-platform solution using modular design patterns, enabling code reuse between web and mobile. Established CI/CD pipeline using Expo EAS for automated testing and deployment.
impact: Delivered platform serving 5 Aboriginal communities, facilitating health research data collection and improving community engagement.
technologies: React, React Native (Expo), TypeScript, Firebase Functions, Firestore, Firebase Auth, Firebase Messaging, Redux, modern React patterns (Context API, hooks)
skills: Full-stack development, Mobile Application Development, Serverless Architecture, Scalable Frontend Design, Team Technical Leadership

description: Online desktop platform supporting complex structural calculations, workflow validation, catalogue management, JSON Schema–validated templates, and admin portal functionality for civil engineering operations.
technologies: NestJS, MikroORM, PostgreSQL (secure), JWT (Passport), Swagger, Jest, TypeScript, React (admin portal), SQLite (testing), JSON Schema, AWS ECS, S3, CloudFront, ECR, ALB, secure private subnets, networking, CI/CD, unit tests, E2E tests, database migrations
responsibilities: Drive project discovery and scope alignment, define backend architecture and data models, implement authentication and CRUD APIs, support admin portal development, document structural modelling decisions, define and enforce JSON Schema validations for catalogue and template data, and seed test/real databases.
highlights: Bridged domain requirements with engineering delivery, designed modular backend architecture, and implemented secure AWS infrastructure including ECS, S3, CloudFront, ECR, ALB, and private subnets. Captured complex structural logic (bracing nodes, base plates, ULS/SLS formulas), implemented scalable ERD and functional modules, and established CI/CD with unit and E2E tests. Leveraged JSON Schema to enforce validation and generate dynamic catalogue/templates, reducing repetitive frontend coding, ensuring consistent data, and simplifying future maintenance.
skills: Backend architecture design, Cloud infrastructure engineering, API design, Database modelling, DevOps and CI/CD pipelines, Test-driven development
impact: Delivered a production-ready platform currently used in civil engineering operations, enabling reliable catalogue and bracing management workflows with validated templates. Supported secure database deployment, API stability, and production-ready admin portal, contributing to client confidence, operational continuity, and reduced development overhead.

project: Quantum Circuit Builder with IoT Mobile Onboarding
description: System enabling students to design and simulate quantum circuits through an interactive web interface connected to a self-hosted quantum simulator, with mobile-based device onboarding and remote device management.
technologies: React, TypeScript, Python, Flask, REST API, Raspberry Pi, Ubuntu Linux, Docker, Mobile Wi-Fi APIs (Android/iOS), WLAN, IoT, OTA updates
responsibilities: Develop cross-platform mobile application to onboard Raspberry Pi simulator devices via Wi-Fi hotspot workflow, implement Flask-based REST API exposing quantum simulator functionality, build interactive web application for constructing and simulating quantum circuits, integrate mobile, web, and backend components, and implement firmware programming for onboarding indicators and WLAN module configuration.
highlights: Delivered an end-to-end architecture connecting mobile onboarding, web-based circuit design, and integrated quantum simulation. Implemented secure device onboarding workflow using Wi-Fi hotspot networking, translated visual quantum circuits into simulator-compatible inputs, and programmed Raspberry Pi peripherals for user feedback during device setup. Introduced Docker-based over-the-air update capability enabling remote device software updates and maintenance.
skills: IoT system integration, Cross-platform development, Network programming, Firmware development, Networking configuration, Linux server configuration
impact: Delivered a functional quantum education platform used for research demonstrations and student learning. Enabled reliable device onboarding, remote system updates, and interactive circuit simulation, supporting the project's transition from research prototype toward commercialisation.
